name: devon-claude-skills
description: Devon's Claude Code skills - PR automation and image generation

plugins.name: pr-review-loop
plugins.description: Autonomous PR review automation with multi-bot support (Gemini, Cursor, Claude)

plugins.name: dream
plugins.description: Mine Claude Code session logs and PR review history into durable project improvements (memories, CLAUDE.md, docs, reviewer-roster tuning) — async 'AI dreaming'.

plugins.name: nano-banana
plugins.description: Image generation, editing, and composition using Google's Gemini 3 Pro Image model

plugins.name: youtube-transcript
plugins.description: Extract transcripts from YouTube videos (plain or timestamped) via youtube-transcript-api

plugins.name: youtube-screenshotter
plugins.description: Download YouTube videos and extract frames at given timestamps with perceptual hashes (mechanical, no LLM)

plugins.name: youtube-synthesizer
plugins.description: Turn a YouTube video into a faithful-capture literature note in an Obsidian vault (transcript + canonical visual scenes + structured extraction)

plugins.name: handoff
plugins.description: Compact the current conversation into a handoff document for another agent (new session, teammate, different agent) to pick up the work without ramping from zero.
